sessionStart.prompt: COMMIT DISCIPLINE REMINDER: Before starting new work, run `git status` to check for uncommitted changes from a completed unit. Stage with `git add <files>` (never `git add .` or `git add -A`), verify with `git diff --cached`, then commit. A unit of work = one domain refactor, one feature, one fix, or one test expansion — never multiple unrelated concerns combined. A TDD cycle alone is not a commit boundary; commit when the full intended change is complete and tests pass.
